name: Patient 1
history: History of substance abuse and completed rehabilitation. Ongoing family difficulties involving emotional neglect from mother. Longstanding obesity since childhood with past bullying related to weight.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't perform perfectly (like being on time), it proves I'm a failure and unlovable.
intermediate_belief_depression: My past defines me; I will always struggle and disappoint others.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of responsibilities, emotional withdrawal, potential relapse into substance use.
situation: Missed an alarm and woke up late for work.
auto_thought: "I can't even do something simple like waking up on time. I'm a mess. My boss will think I'm unreliable, just like my mother did."
behavior: Calls in sick to avoid facing colleagues, spirals into self-critical rumination, possibly skips meals or engages in emotional eating.
